facebook.caption: Flipper diving club in Búng Gội is one of those finds that makes Phu Quoc so much more than a beach holiday. Rated 4.9 out of 5 from over 400 reviews, this dive club has clearly earned the trust of the diving community here. Whether you are a complete beginner or a certified diver looking to explore the reefs around the island, this is the place to start. Tip: book ahead, especially during peak season, as slots fill quickly.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bubbles rise, the reef come alive, and nervous first-timers turn into wide-eyed divers within a single session. Flipper diving club at Búng Gội is doing something right, and the underwater footage tells the whole story. Over 400 guests have given this club a 4.9 rating, and the clips show exactly why.

instagram.caption: 4.9 stars from 400+ divers. Flipper diving club at Búng Gội is quietly one of Phu Quoc's best-kept secrets for underwater adventures. Beginners welcome, experienced divers spoiled. Book ahead, slots go fast.
instagram.video_caption: Fins on, mask down, and in you go. Flipper diving club at Búng Gội shows you a side of Phu Quoc most visitors never see. 4.9 stars for a very good reason.
